# BudDash — Design System Master File

> **LOGIC:** When building a specific page, first check `design-system/buddash/pages/[page-name].md`.
> If that file exists, its rules **override** this Master file. If not, follow the rules below.

**Project:** BudDash (cannabis delivery / dispensary e-commerce)
**Stack:** React + Material UI (MUI) + Apollo GraphQL (CRA)
**Category:** Cannabis e-commerce / delivery
**Generated by:** ui-ux-pro-max — corrected for cannabis branding (style: Organic Biophilic)

---

## 1. Color Palette

Cannabis brands read best with **forest green + warm earth tones on a soft cream base** —
calm, natural, premium. Avoid the generic SaaS blue and AI purple/pink gradients.

| Role | Hex | CSS Variable | Notes |
|------|-----|--------------|-------|
| Primary | `#2E7D32` | `--color-primary` | Forest green — brand, headers, primary buttons |
| Primary Dark | `#1B5E20` | `--color-primary-dark` | Hover / pressed |
| On Primary | `#FFFFFF` | `--color-on-primary` | Text on green (passes AA) |
| Secondary | `#6B7B3C` | `--color-secondary` | Olive — tags, secondary accents |
| Accent / CTA | `#C2410C` | `--color-accent` | Burnt-clay orange — "Add to cart", checkout (white text = AA) |
| Background | `#F7F4EC` | `--color-background` | Soft cream page background |
| Surface | `#FFFFFF` | `--color-surface` | Cards, sheets, modals |
| Foreground / Text | `#1C2B22` | `--color-foreground` | Deep green-charcoal (≈13:1 on cream) |
| Muted Text | `#5B6B5F` | `--color-muted-fg` | Secondary copy (≈4.7:1 on cream) |
| Muted Surface | `#E7E3D6` | `--color-muted` | Chips, disabled fills |
| Border | `#D8D2C2` | `--color-border` | Dividers, input borders |
| Success | `#2E7D32` | `--color-success` | Order confirmed |
| Destructive | `#DC2626` | `--color-destructive` | Remove item, errors |
| Ring (focus) | `#2E7D32` | `--color-ring` | Visible focus outline |

---

## 2. Typography — "Soft Rounded" (friendly + approachable)

- **Heading Font:** Varela Round
- **Body Font:** Nunito Sans
- **Mood:** friendly, warm, approachable, wellness, premium-but-not-stiff
- **Premium alternative** (if you want a sharper feel): DM Sans headings + Nunito Sans body

```css
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Varela+Round&display=swap');
```

**Type scale:** 12 · 14 · 16 (body base) · 18 · 24 · 32 · 40
**Line-height:** 1.5–1.7 body, 1.2 headings · **Weights:** 700 headings, 600 labels, 400 body

---

## 3. Spacing (4 / 8px rhythm)

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--space-xs` | 4px | Tight gaps |
| `--space-sm` | 8px | Icon gaps, inline |
| `--space-md` | 16px | Standard padding |
| `--space-lg` | 24px | Card / section padding |
| `--space-xl` | 32px | Large gaps |
| `--space-2xl` | 48px | Section margins |
| `--space-3xl` | 64px | Hero padding |

## 4. Radius & Shadows (organic = generous rounding, soft shadows)

| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--radius-sm` | 8px (inputs, chips) |
| `--radius-md` | 16px (buttons, cards) |
| `--radius-lg` | 24px (hero, sheets, featured cards) |
| `--shadow-sm` | `0 1px 2px rgba(28,43,34,0.06)` |
| `--shadow-md` | `0 4px 12px rgba(28,43,34,0.08)` |
| `--shadow-lg` | `0 10px 24px rgba(28,43,34,0.10)` |

---

## 5. MUI Theme Mapping

Map the tokens into your existing MUI `createTheme` (BudDash already uses `@mui/material`):

```js
import { createTheme } from '@mui/material/styles';

export const theme = createTheme({
  palette: {
    primary:   { main: '#2E7D32', dark: '#1B5E20', contrastText: '#FFFFFF' },
    secondary: { main: '#6B7B3C', contrastText: '#FFFFFF' },
    // use the burnt-clay accent for the cart/checkout CTA
    warning:   { main: '#C2410C', contrastText: '#FFFFFF' }, // or a custom `accent` key
    error:     { main: '#DC2626' },
    success:   { main: '#2E7D32' },
    background:{ default: '#F7F4EC', paper: '#FFFFFF' },
    text:      { primary: '#1C2B22', secondary: '#5B6B5F' },
    divider:   '#D8D2C2',
  },
  shape: { borderRadius: 16 },
  typography: {
    fontFamily: '"Nunito Sans", sans-serif',
    h1: { fontFamily: '"Varela Round", sans-serif', fontWeight: 700 },
    h2: { fontFamily: '"Varela Round", sans-serif', fontWeight: 700 },
    h3: { fontFamily: '"Varela Round", sans-serif', fontWeight: 700 },
    button: { textTransform: 'none', fontWeight: 600 },
  },
});
```

> Wrap the app in `<ThemeProvider theme={theme}>` (likely already done) and add the
> Google Fonts `@import` to your global CSS / `index.html`.

---

## 6. Style: Organic Biophilic

**Keywords:** nature, organic shapes, green, sustainable, rounded, flowing, earthy, wellness
**Key effects:** generous rounded corners (16–24px), soft natural shadows, 200–300ms transitions,
subtle organic/blob SVG accents, large product imagery.

### Page Pattern — cannabis storefront
1. **Hero** — value prop + age-gate aware, prominent "Shop / Order now" CTA
2. **Category browse** — strain types / product categories as rounded cards
3. **Product grid** — high-quality imagery, price, THC/CBD %, ratings
4. **Product detail** — effects, lab info, add-to-cart (accent CTA)
5. **Cart / checkout** — delivery address, ID/age verification, payment
6. **Trust** — licensing, delivery zone, reviews

---

## 7. Anti-Patterns (Do NOT use)

- ❌ Generic SaaS **blue** or AI **purple/pink** gradients (off-brand for cannabis)
- ❌ **Emojis as icons** — use SVG (Lucide / Heroicons / MUI Icons)
- ❌ Low-quality product imagery
- ❌ Missing `cursor: pointer` on clickable elements
- ❌ Layout-shifting hover transforms
- ❌ Text below 4.5:1 contrast
- ❌ Instant (0ms) state changes — always 150–300ms transitions
- ❌ Invisible focus states

---

## 8. Pre-Delivery Checklist

- [ ] No emojis as icons (SVG only, one consistent set)
- [ ] `cursor: pointer` on all clickable elements
- [ ] Hover + focus states with 150–300ms transitions
- [ ] Body text contrast ≥ 4.5:1, large text ≥ 3:1 (verify green/cream pairs)
- [ ] Focus rings visible for keyboard nav
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` respected
- [ ] Responsive at 375 / 768 / 1024 / 1440px, no horizontal scroll
- [ ] Touch targets ≥ 44×44px
- [ ] Age/ID verification present in order flow (cannabis compliance)
- [ ] Content not hidden behind fixed navbar
